class.name: sura_sensors/ImuBroadcaster
class.description: Broadcast IMU data from ros2_control state interfaces.

class.name: sura_sensors/MagnetometerBroadcaster
class.description: Broadcast magnetometer data from ros2_control state interfaces.

class.name: sura_sensors/PressureBroadcaster
class.description: Broadcasts pressure-derived pose from ros2_control state interfaces.

class.name: sura_sensors/BatteryBroadcaster
class.description: Broadcasts battery state from ros2_control state interfaces.

class.name: sura_sensors/Dvl75GpsBroadcaster
class.description: DVL-75 GPS broadcaster publishing NavSatFix from real GPS retweeted by the DVL.
